metadata.description: Configurable resource name prefix (default agentloom).
Short environment name (azd env), e.g. dev, prod.
Azure region for all resources.
Object id of the user/principal running azd up (for KV access).
Foundry model to deploy (Azure OpenAI compatible).
Foundry model version.
Foundry embedding model to deploy (for RAG vector search).
Foundry embedding model version.
Container image tag to deploy initially (azd overrides this).
Whether each service already exists (set by azd via SERVICE_*_RESOURCE_EXISTS).
Auth mode: dev (HS256 demo tokens) or production (Entra RS256/JWKS).
Provider workforce (admin) tenant id.
Admin SPA app registration client id (token audience).
Customer Entra External ID (CIAM) tenant id.
CIAM tenant initial-domain label, e.g. agentloomcustomers.
Customer SPA app registration client id (token audience).
org_id claim name emitted on customer tokens (claims-mapping policy emits "org_id").
CIAM provisioning app (client-credentials) used by the backend to create per-customer groups. Empty disables group provisioning.
Key Vault secret name holding the CIAM provisioning app secret.
CIAM provisioning app secret value. When provided, it is written into Key Vault at deploy time (control-plane, works with public access disabled). Empty = leave Key Vault untouched.
Admin SPA: MSAL client id / authority / API scope (workforce).
Customer SPA: MSAL client id / authority / API scope (CIAM).
VNet address space.
Subnet for the Container Apps environment (Consumption needs /23).
Subnet that holds the private endpoints.
Optional: name of the CIAM provisioning secret to seed at deploy time.
Optional: value of the CIAM provisioning secret. Empty = do not create/update it (the control-plane write works even when public network access is disabled).
Subnet that hosts the private endpoint NIC.
Resource id of the PaaS service to connect to.
Private link group id, e.g. "Sql" (Cosmos) or "blob" (Storage).
Private DNS zone id to register the endpoint A record into.
Subnet that hosts the private endpoint NIC.
Resource id of the PaaS service to connect to.
Private link group id, e.g. "Sql" (Cosmos) or "blob" (Storage).
Private DNS zone id to register the endpoint A record into.
Subnet that hosts the private endpoint NIC.
Resource id of the PaaS service to connect to.
Private link group id, e.g. "Sql" (Cosmos) or "blob" (Storage).
Private DNS zone id to register the endpoint A record into.
Optional infrastructure subnet id for VNet integration. When set, the environment can reach private endpoints. Immutable after creation.
